items.claim: Conor McGregor has not fought in the octagon since 2021.
items.quote: The last time Conor McGregor has fought was 2021, ladies and gentlemen.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's fighting style became more stiff and boxing-oriented later in his career compared to his earlier, more dynamic movement.
items.quote: later in his career, he became more stiff. be became more a boxer where I felt that played more into his opponent's uh favor instead of his own because he was very dynamic.

items.claim: Conor McGregor tends to lose his effectiveness when he gets drawn into a boxing-heavy fight.
items.quote: when he gets in a boxing fest with Nate Diaz uh when he gets in that boxing fest he tends to lose that spark

items.claim: Max Holloway is a high-volume striker who excels at maintaining range and angling.
items.quote: Max was able to piece him up, keeping the range, angling, keeping having it hard for Justin Gate to get himself in a position where he was able to hit him.

items.claim: Max Holloway's high-volume boxing style is an effective counter to Conor McGregor's movement-based striking.
items.quote: I think the sooner he gets to that boxing range with Conor McGregor, it plays away from Conor McGregor's, you know, mystic ability to be able to move around

items.claim: Conor McGregor will experience ring rust due to his long layoff from competition.
items.quote: I believe there is [ring rust]. Especially for an athlete who's so precise and and the movement and hitting him.

items.claim: Fighting at 170 pounds will cause Conor McGregor's power to dwindle as the fight progresses.
items.quote: at the same time, as the fight goes on, the power is going to dwindle.
